entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company betting on a story-based candidate engine to satisfy communities, members, and employers

entities.name: Communities
entities.context: Stakeholder group wanting higher engagement, member outcomes, and brand-respecting partners

entities.name: Members
entities.context: Community participants seeking low-overhead opportunity exploration as passive candidates

entities.name: Employers
entities.context: Stakeholder group wanting credible shortlists mixing active and passive candidates

entities.name: Story-based candidate engine
entities.context: Careerspan's core mechanism fed by communities to satisfy all three stakeholder groups

entities.name: Passive candidates
entities.context: Job seekers exploring opportunities without full job search overhead and risk

relationships.context: Core bet that this engine can satisfy communities, members, and employers simultaneously
Engine is fed by communities as input source
Communities contain members whose outcomes they want to showcase
Employers want access to passive candidates to see what they could get
Members want to explore opportunities as passive candidates
